_comment: Per-model metadata for the /dinosaur-3d cluster photoreal-asset layer. Hand-authored; make-dinosaur-3d-manifest.mjs hashes each .glb and emits manifest.json. Every entry MUST be freely redistributable (CC0 / CC-BY / CC-BY-SA / public-domain; SA entries: the re-hosted derivative stays under the same ShareAlike license - see CREDITS.txt), verified per-file (see licenses/CREDITS.txt). 'targetLenUnits' is the scene-unit length the viewer scales the model's longest axis to (12 matches the size-vs-human reference in the page). 'kind' = fleshed | skeleton (drives the honesty disclosure).

doliosauriscus.author: seth the yutyrannus
doliosauriscus.credit: Doliosauriscus model by seth the yutyrannus (CC-BY-SA 4.0, via Printables; OBJ->glTF conversion with applied countershading)
doliosauriscus.notes: Seth Printables CC-BY-SA (license id 2); Aspose.3D OBJ object Object_5 (no Daz/Dinoraul/franchise); ~20k tris trimesh+Open3D quadric; length-X feet Y=0. Middle Permian anteosaurid synapsid (not a dinosaur); historically Doliosauriscus, often synonymized with Titanophoneus.

mamenchisaurus.author: seth the yutyrannus
mamenchisaurus.credit: Mamenchisaurus model by seth the yutyrannus (CC-BY-SA 4.0, via Printables; STL->glTF conversion, neutral countershading applied)
mamenchisaurus.notes: Seth Printables CC-BY-SA (license id 2, disallowRemixing:false); STLEXP Object01 header, no Daz/Dinoraul/Jurassic/franchise strings; decimated 161168->20000 tris via trimesh+Open3D quadric; length-X feet Y=0. targetLenUnits raised 12->25 (dino3d-discovery-loop-runbook fire113 PROVE fix): the page's file-local longNeck camera/ground framing (radius 38, ground disk 60) was tuned for the procedural body's real ~25-unit tail-to-head span; the default 12 normalized the swapped glTF to roughly half that, rendering as a near-invisible sliver at default zoom.

compsognathus.credit: Compsognathus model by seth the yutyrannus (CC-BY-SA 4.0, via Printables; OBJ->glTF conversion, neutral countershading applied)
